calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kaipo Young, Esq. for Plaintiff: Butterfly LLC.
Plaintiff's witness: Gil Silberman, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and documents in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Structure Builders and Matthew James O'Brien as follows: Principal $104,775.92
Costs $310.50 for a total of $105,086.42
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Vacated

Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Set For Trial On Aug-23-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-03-04 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 514
